title: Senior Teacher - EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies:
EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EduComp Solutions Digital Technologies!
